description_long: This is a modern wristwatch with a robust metallic link bracelet and a round case featuring a deep blue bezel. The watch case is substantial, with prominent pushers and a crown on the right side, suggesting chronograph functionality. The dial is dark, likely blue or black, with multiple subdials and luminous hands and markers, giving it a sporty yet sophisticated appearance. The bracelet is composed of solid, brushed metal links, providing both durability and a premium feel. The bezel is marked with tachymeter numerals, enhancing its technical and functional look. The overall design is sleek and masculine, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A robust, metallic wristwatch with a blue tachymeter bezel, chronograph pushers, and a solid link bracelet. The dial features multiple subdials and luminous markers for a sporty, premium look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick metallic bracelet and the watch's round case with a slightly protruding crown.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dial, blue tachymeter bezel, chronograph pushers, and the brand logo on the crown.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bracelet and the case profile, with the crown visible on the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the bracelet's clasp and the back of the watch case, with no visible branding.
attribute_brand_logo: Circular emblem with shield and stylized letter, located on the crown and faintly on the dial.
attribute_dial_design: Chronograph style with three subdials, luminous baton indices, and a tachymeter scale on the bezel. The dial is dark with metallic accents and features bold, legible hands and markers.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of brushed stainless steel, with solid, articulated links.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three central hands and three subdials, luminous markers, and a tachymeter scale. No digital elements visible.
attribute_clasp_style: Fold-over clasp with safety, integrated into the metal bracelet.
